narrative:
Lordstown Village C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 766 registered voters, with 51.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.9%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.1 percentage points.
